notes: TurboReg and TEASER++ use the project FPFH nearest-neighbor correspondence path, not TurboReg's official FCGF/PREDATOR correspondence setting.
PointRegGPT GeoTransformer-16w uses the GeoTransformer architecture and metadata with the 160k checkpoint from the PointRegGPT release package.
PointRegGPT GeoTransformer-2w uses the same export path with the 20k checkpoint from the PointRegGPT release package.

GeoTransformer ETH uses the 3DMatch checkpoint on the official ETH gt.log pairs converted to the GeoTransformer data schema with 2048 sampled points per source/reference, so it is a cross-dataset generalization check rather than ETH-specific training.
PointRegGPT GeoTransformer-16w and 2w ETH use the same ETH conversion with the PointRegGPT 160k and 20k checkpoints, so they are cross-dataset generalization checks rather than ETH-specific training.
An ETH inverse-transform diagnostic did not improve GeoTransformer or PointRegGPT pose metrics, so the weak ETH learned results are not explained by a source/reference direction inversion.
CPD was rerun on ModelNet with pycpd similarity scale disabled so it is evaluated as a rigid baseline.
FPFH-RANSAC on ETH uses a capped 5000-iteration budget because the default 100000-iteration run was too slow.
ETH CPD with a capped 10-iteration budget ran for more than 10 minutes without producing a full summary and was stopped.
Overly complex methods or datasets are intentionally left as empty records instead of blocking the current benchmark.
MPS-GAF ModelNet40 source-2/crop convergence training is still running; an automatic final-eval watcher is staged and will evaluate the best checkpoint after the training process exits.

mps_gaf_short_retrain_smoke.note: 3-epoch short retrain on the new server; use as path/schema smoke, not as the converged ModelNet result.

mac_fpfh_eval20_20260527.note: Project FPFH-correspondence implementation of MAC-style maximal-clique filtering; 20 batches with groups_per_batch=4.

sc2_pcr_fpfh_eval20_20260527.note: Project FPFH-correspondence implementation of SC2-PCR-style second-order spatial compatibility; 20 batches with groups_per_batch=4.

kiss_matcher_eval20_20260527.note: Official kiss-matcher Python package wrapped in the project benchmark; 20 batches with groups_per_batch=4.

mac_fpfh_20260527.note: Official GeoTransformer 3DMatch metadata with PREDATOR indoor point clouds; project FPFH-correspondence MAC variant.

sc2_pcr_fpfh_20260527.note: Official GeoTransformer 3DMatch metadata with PREDATOR indoor point clouds; project FPFH-correspondence SC2-PCR variant.

kiss_matcher_20260527.note: Official GeoTransformer 3DMatch metadata with PREDATOR indoor point clouds; official kiss-matcher package wrapped in project schema.

mac_fpfh_20260527.note: Official GeoTransformer 3DLoMatch metadata with PREDATOR indoor point clouds; project FPFH-correspondence MAC variant.

sc2_pcr_fpfh_20260527.note: Official GeoTransformer 3DLoMatch metadata with PREDATOR indoor point clouds; project FPFH-correspondence SC2-PCR variant.

kiss_matcher_20260527.note: Official GeoTransformer 3DLoMatch metadata with PREDATOR indoor point clouds; official kiss-matcher package wrapped in project schema.

cast.reason: CUDA-extension/dependency stack is too heavy for the current server scope.

cofinet.reason: Official environment/checkpoint staging is not available in the current scope.

regtr.reason: Official environment/checkpoint staging is not available in the current scope.

pointdsc.reason: CUDA-extension dependency risk is high on a server without nvcc.

buffer_x.reason: Full evaluation requires CUDA extensions plus large official preprocessed data beyond the current disk budget.

integer.reason: Official environment/checkpoint staging is not available in the current scope and the method targets KITTI/nuScenes.

official_mac_descriptor_pipeline.reason: Current reported row is the same-schema MAC-FPFH variant.

official_sc2_pcr_pipeline.reason: Current reported row is the same-schema SC2-PCR-FPFH variant.

kitti.reason: Point clouds are not staged and disk budget is limited.

eth_cpd_full_budget.reason: Capped CPD was already too slow on ETH.
